title: More Chiseled Bookshelf Variants 3D
description: Adds 3D modeled elements to LieOn Studio's More Chiseled Bookshelf Variants mod
body:
![3D modeled element version of all chiseled bookshelf variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05329b730043aa03961b84c88631eb226abf1403.png)

This resource pack changes the rendering of the Chiseled Bookshelf models in LieOn Studio's More Chiseled Bookshelf Variants mod to have full 3D elements instead of flat textures. This is based on the technique used by Stridey for Vanilla Tweaks.
